_doc: Per-booth allowlist of cover_url source authors that DON'T match the booth's circle handle but are legitimate (寄攤 / 委託 / collab partner). Update when a manual review confirms a mismatch is intentional. Format: { <event-slug>: { <booth_id>: { 'handles': [<x_handle_no_at>], 'note': '<why>' } } }

U-30.note: 河豚老師 — body 明記の 寄攤 partner (新刊 超時空輝姬 漫畫本)
